revision.comment: Don't try to link to subpages of [[Wikipedia:Translation]], they're long gone
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= <!--{{Proofreader needed}} begin-->{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{<includeonly>subst:</includeonly>NAMESPACE}}|<includeonly>[[Category:Pages with incorrectly substituted templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] </includeonly>|}}{{Ambox | name = Proofreader needed | type = style | image = [[Image:Translation to english arrow.svg|50px| ]] | issue = This {{{what|article}}} has been '''[[Wikipedia:Translation|translated]]''' from {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|the article '''[[:{{{2}}}:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]'''|an article}} in {{#if:{{mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{2|}}}}} | the {{#language:{{{2|}}}|en}} | another }} Wikipedia|a Wikipedia article in another language}}, and '''requires proofreading'''. | fix = If you are confident enough in your fluency of English and {{#if:{{mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{2|}}}}} | {{#language:{{{2|}}}|en}} | the original language }}, please proofread it. | cat = Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation | date = {{{date|}}} | all = {{#if:{{mw lang|fn=is_code|{{{2|}}}}} | Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{#language:{{{2|}}}|en}} }} }}<!--{{Proofreader needed}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
